each October and April. There were a total of 10 EVAA analytical cycles, between October 2017 and April 2022. The model alignment file names indicate the cycle number (01-10) and the year and month of the cycle. In addition, there is a final model alignment file that represents the alignment status of model beneficiaries at the end of the model.
What does this file include? (variable highlights)
- Model-Assigned Practice ID
- Practice Name
- Practice TIN
- Unique Model-Assigned Patient ID
